topWin: Shipped the pacing layer the roadmap had been pointing at, then closed the protocol drift that would have left start/closeout referencing missing commands.
topGap: Combat readability and trust/coaching follow-through still matter more than adding yet more content breadth.
ignisNote: The highest-return move was not another content drop; it was making encounter pacing feel authored and then restoring protocol accuracy so the repo can sustain that quality bar.
